category_sources: source_facts.description says command-line utilities to setup and support NiFi; official Toolkit Guide says the toolkit contains command-line utilities for NiFi environments.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is nifi-toolkit; official guide title is Apache NiFi Toolkit Guide.
docs_sources: Official Apache NiFi Toolkit Guide documents the CLI and utilities; official documentation page links Toolkit Guide.
repo_sources: Official Apache NiFi documentation site links Source to GitHub; toolkit is part of the Apache NiFi source repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists nifi-cli; official Toolkit Guide describes CLI utilities for automating NiFi and NiFi Registry administration.
